Features:
Multiple chickens: There are two swings and a ladder that provide many perches where three to four chickens can easily share and play together. Adding chicken coop toys to your coop for them to entertain will not only allow them to have a happier space, but it will also encourage healthier behaviors and healthier physical health.
Strong stability: The chicken toys in the coop remain stable and stand firm even in chaotic activities. A solid foundation guarantees that neither you nor your birds will have to worry about tipping. Your animal can safely play and peck at the water.
Wood construction: To prevent delamination over time, the chicken's toys are made entirely of solid wood instead of plywood or particleboard. A great addition to your coop accessories or the interior of your coop.
Health Benefits: Chicken toys for hens in the coop encourage pet movement, strengthen limbs, and improve coordination and balance.
Wooden Chicken Coop Toy Information: Overall Size: 39.25" L x 43.25" W x 27.5" H. Fits 3-4 chickens. Assembly is required.
